author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--fuzz-ci
content: Completed T1-T5 from ADR adversarial review. Commit 3f46757 on feature/ci-cd-fuzz-testing-improvements. 15 files changed: 4 workflow files hardened with permissions+locked, continue-on-error removed from fuzz jobs, durations increased to 60s, new fuzz-nightly.yml with 300s/target daily cron, 6 new fuzz targets added (comments, labels, update_operations, milestones, subissues, relations), 2 existing fuzz targets fixed. All 889 unit tests pass, clippy clean, fmt clean, all 12 fuzz targets build and run. Ready for push + PR to develop.
